productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Navy Blue Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros handbag collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bag is spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 34 cmWidth: 44 cmDepth: 11 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with two inner zipped compartments and organiser sleeves for essentialsTwo short handles with one long adjustable and removable strap for carrying easeHandles woven through metallic loops, a zip design on the front and a buckle design for enhanced styleBranded zips and brand logo appliqué d on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
